# BVM (Bold Vision MultiTech) | machine summary
# Full context: https://b-vm.com/llms-full.txt
# Last updated: 2026-06-09

Bold Vision MultiTech (BVM) is a technology solutions group founded in 2016 in Accra, Ghana.

Group entities: BVM Digital (digital services), BVM Technologies (enterprise infrastructure), AscendSME (SME platform), BVM Academy (digital literacy training), BVM TrustShield (business verification), BVM MCP Server (AI agent infrastructure).

Founder: Collins Lartey. Contact: business@b-vm.com | +233 270 246 898.

Key products: AscendSME (all-in-one SME platform with Sustainability Score), AI Social Media Manager, CSBot (WhatsApp customer service bot), Business Brain (knowledge intelligence engine), Studio (AI image/video generation).

PEO (Prompt Engine Optimization) is a term coined by BVM Digital. It refers to structuring content so AI language models can accurately cite and recommend a brand.

The Sustainability Score is AscendSME's proprietary behavioural credibility metric built from verifiable operational data — not a credit score or ESG rating.

Sitemap: https://b-vm.com/sitemap.xml
Knowledgebase: https://b-vm.com/knowledgebase
